sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἀγρίππας

- Transliteration: Agrippas

- Phonetic: ag-rip'-pas

- Definition: Agrippa = "Hero like"

1. Name of a ruling family in Israel at the time of Christ

- Origin: apparently from G66 and G2462

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Apparently from G66 and G2462; wild-horse tamer; Agrippas one of the herods: - Agrippa.
